title: descurainia millefolia
intro: Descurainia millefolia, also known as western tansy mustard or common tansy mustard, is a perennial herb native to Western North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Descurainia millefolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting healing, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as eczema, acne, and bruises. Herbal preparations of Descurainia millefolia can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
